title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.203 - Complaints against child care facilities, open records to be kept by department
text:
210.203.  Complaints against child care facilities, open records to be kept by department. — The department of elementary and secondary education shall maintain a record of substantiated, signed parental complaints against child care facilities licensed pursuant to this chapter, and shall make such complaints and findings available to the public upon request.
(L. 1993 H.B. 376, A.L. 2022 S.B. 683)
